title: Create:Dall
description: An Additon to the Create mod.
body:
Mod Description

 

An Additon to the Create mod  (a mod that adds ways to automate and make things easier with rotational power) adding a simple recipe to create the Creative motor with rotational power. This is one of the Only Simple mods to craft the creative motor to gain infinite power.

 

https://discord.gg/qPmh277y

Adds: 
Crafting recipe for the creative motor from the crate mod
Creative casing normal and deco variant 
creative alloy
creative copper alloy block (used to craft creative casing)
